description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a matte black finish, reminiscent of the iconic Heckler & Koch MP5. It features a fixed synthetic stock, a cylindrical fore-end, and a prominent suppressor attached to the barrel. The receiver is equipped with iron sights and a selector switch above the trigger group. The magazine is not visible, but the design suggests compatibility with a detachable box magazine. The overall construction appears robust, with most components made from metal and polymer, suitable for tactical or law enforcement use in urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun-style rifle with a fixed stock and suppressor, featuring iron sights and a robust build.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, fixed stock, suppressor, and iron sights clearly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor and barrel alignment, with minimal detail of the stock or receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the profile of view 0, with visible selector switch and trigger group.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and receiver, with the barrel and suppressor receding from view.
